nasb.text: Every male among the priests may eat of it. It shall be eaten in a holy place; it is most holy.

esv.text: Every male among the priests may eat of it. It shall be eaten in a holy place. It is most holy.

cnv.text: 祭司家中的男丁，都可以吃祭牲的肉，要在聖潔的地方吃；這是至聖的。

ccb.text: 祭司家的任何男子都可以吃剩下的祭肉，但要在圣洁之处吃，因为这是至圣之物。
